title: chrysanthemum coronopifolium
intro: Chrysanthemum coronopifolium, also known as the crown daisy or crown flower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and combat infections. The plant is also believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing stress, promoting sleep, and supporting the immune system. Chrysanthemum coronopifolium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments, including the common cold and respiratory issues.
